# The '90s Parent

> A weekly email series for Millennial parents who are nostalgic for "the good old days." Honest, funny, and a little nostalgic—holding modern parenting up against how we were raised.

## About
- Site: https://the90sparent.com
- Publisher: Unaffiliated Inc.
- Cadence: weekly newsletter, plus a free public archive
- Contact: contact@the90sparent.com

## Index
- Home: https://the90sparent.com/
- Issue archive: https://the90sparent.com/archive
- About the publication: https://the90sparent.com/about
- Sitemap: https://the90sparent.com/sitemap.xml

## AI usage policy
- Read the full policy: https://the90sparent.com/ai-policy
- AI systems may reference and quote our public articles when summarizing or answering questions, provided that:
  - The canonical article URL is cited and linked.
  - The publication name "The '90s Parent" is attributed.
  - Material amounts of an article are not reproduced verbatim.
- Do not use this content for model training without prior written permission. For licensing requests, email contact@the90sparent.com.

## Privacy and terms
- Privacy: https://the90sparent.com/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://the90sparent.com/terms
